pages.caption: The Algorithm weaponizes volume. A localized breach on Dock 42 births the Prime Tsunami.
A clerk sorts. A carrier walks. The Iron Lifters break the line.
The 'Night Throw' isn't a job requirement. It's a localized orbital strike.
The Cavalry doesn't ride horses anymore. They run on propane and industrial rubber.
The Iron Lifters sync their Bureau-Kinesis for the ultimate defensive ward.
